title: Overpowered Woodland Mansions
description: A complete overhaul of the Woodland Mansion, that stays true to its vanilla roots; better looking, better loot, better baddies :) Warning! You will probably die ;)
body:
Ever feel that Woodland Mansions are not worth the trip? Why is it that the stronghold of the fearsome Illager armies, has empty store rooms and mediocre loot? This data pack is my attempt to to breath new life, into what I have always felt is a structure that never reached its full potential. Especially considering that it is more of an end game destination. I've tried to keep the vanilla feel, but have added my own twist. There are a lot of secrets to be discovered by those who have keen eyes and sharp mind. High risk, high reward; do you have what it takes to brave an overpowered Woodland Mansion? (Don't chicken out and play in peaceful mode.) Maybe I've overdone it a bit, but it wouldn't be overpowered then would it? 

**Bonus:** Pillager outpost chests now have a chance of generating a map locating a mansion.

A lot of time and effort went into this and I hope that it shows. 

Thanks to my younger brother for being my guinea pig! If enough people like this, I may consider other projects in the future. Blessings and enjoy!


Feedback and suggestions: 

yoshiq222@gmail.com

[https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/overpowered-woodland-mansions/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/overpowered-woodland-mansions/)
